title: AI Finds Natural Ozempic - TCR 04/13/26
description:
Stanford's Peptide Predictor algorithm scanned all 20,000 human protein-coding genes and found a natural appetite peptide that outperformed GLP-1 tenfold, as UK financial regulators joined the transatlantic Mythos emergency response.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-13-2026/

Stanford researchers used an AI algorithm called Peptide Predictor to scan the entire human proteome for bioactive peptides, identifying BRP - a twelve-amino-acid molecule that activated hypothalamic appetite-control neurons tenfold more strongly than GLP-1 and reduced food intake by 50% in animal studies without the nausea, constipation, or muscle loss associated with semaglutide. A companion Stanford study found that roughly 10% of the population carries genetic variants conferring GLP-1 resistance, meaning AI-driven drug discovery and precision genomics are advancing together to reshape who gets which treatment and when. A Weizmann Institute study published in Science found genetics account for approximately 50% of human lifespan variation, doubling the previous scientific consensus and strengthening the case for targeted longevity research. Allogene Therapeutics reported its off-the-shelf CAR-T therapy achieved minimal residual disease negativity in 58% of lymphoma patients versus 16% with standard care. The Claude Mythos cybersecurity arc crossed the Atlantic as UK financial regulators convened urgent talks with major banks and the National Cyber Security Centre, extending the U.S. Treasury summit into a two-continent emergency coordination framework built within a single week. Fortescue announced acceleration of its Pilbara green grid to 290 MW by early next year, targeting full 2 GW completion by 2028 to eliminate fossil fuels entirely from iron ore extraction at industrial scale. Rolls-Royce SMR secured nearly £600 million to begin construction of small modular reactors at Wylfa on Anglesey. A second armed attack on Sam Altman's residence within 48 hours of the first signaled the intensifying physical friction accompanying decisions that carry civilizational weight.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-april-13-2026/
